Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr followed by delete_rr for the identical RR. The post-update query checks whether the server applied the operations sequentially, collapsed them as a no-op, or rejected the message.

Steps.Description: Add x.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.10 and then delete the identical RR in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether x.campus.edu. A remains present after the conflicting UPDATE.
